reviews.review_description: For now I only played against the (pretty funny) bot. But I plan on playing it with my friend soon. Super fun and easy to learn. Also I really like that you have to move fast, which gives the game the needed speed in addition to the tactic.

developer_response.body: Take care not to bump into your friend while playing. Friendships can get ruined that way XD

reviews.review_description: Played this in my backyard and was amazed how the game scanned that view and was able to make it seem like I was destroying the ground!! Great way to have competitions and be strategic. With multiplayer being added I can’t wait to play with friends!

developer_response.body: It's great to hear you're enjoying the strategic and competitive aspects. The addition of multiplayer will definitely take the fun to the next level. Imagine the intense competitions you'll have with your friends right in your own space!

reviews.review_description: If you like naval warfare, this game will impress you. Although it requires a lot of space to play, it's worth seeking out. It's simple, fun, strategic, and has very good graphics. It's very easy to use! Naval battles have never been so realistic! Highly recommended.

developer_response.body: The minimum area required has been reduced so as to allow more users to play in smaller bounds. We are glad to have another commander and hope you help us destroy the enemy!

reviews.review_description: What really stood out to me was how the game blended creativity and realism so perfectly.  The interaction design is so intuitive that it almost felt second nature, It’s not just a game, it’s a place your mind keeps going back to, even after you’ve taken off the headset. if you want to experience a game that makes you feel like you're really there, and almost makes you fall into imaginary water (like I did 😂), then you need to try this.

developer_response.body: Make sure you wear a swimming float so that you are safe if you fall in the water.  Glad you enjoyed the game.

reviews.review_description:
Tried playing the game for around an hour, Pretty interesting concept overall. I initially struggled with creating room and stuff but i guess it was a headset issue. The game overall was enjoyable.

The game feels like it has alot of space to grow especially since it feels its trying to deliver a narrative but isn’t doing great job but also its early access so it should be fixable.

Gameplay overall feels solid especially moving from one part of room to another collecting energy and destroying floor. The AI feels a bit overpowered but i guess it also makes the game challenging .

Overall concept feels solid for earlyaccess so giving a solid 5/5. Would like to see what more is to come. :)

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We'll take a look at the narrative and see where we can improve. Stay tuned for multiplayer, it's gonna be explosive!

reviews.review_description: This game has been crafted with genuine love and attention, the new multiplayer mode is a lot of fun! Highly recommend

developer_response.body: That's great to hear, Make sure to protect your ships from all enemies out there!

reviews.review_title: Played it till my battery died D
reviews.review_description:
Most games that incorporate mixed reality, don't use it efficiently. This game however blew my mind. 

I love the immersion and the character models.
The mirror before the game started was a neat gimmick. Maybe add an option to click and save images to the gallery.

One thing that really stood out was the enemy character Named HYDRON, I loved how intimidating he was. Its  voice, presence, and design made every encounter feel intense and personal. It added a whole new level of excitement and pressure to the battles. Facing off against such a powerful and menacing enemy kept me fully engaged the entire time.

developer_response.body: The enemy is gonna get his comrades to fight you in the future. Make sure you are ready for battle!

reviews.review_description: Was obliterated by the enemy in the first few tries, but soon understood better strategies to use the different types of weapons. the game was really engaging - spent all day just trying it out. Can say for sure, one of the most engaging games on quest right now - the actions for attacking and energy collection really bring it to life! Revived my memories of playing battle ship with my friends, but on a whole new level!

I had this Navy vet in my Neiborhood. He introduced me to the OG battleship board game and me, and my friends used to go nuts back in the day. Playing something so similar bought back so many memories, kudos and keep on working hard. The AI kinda sounds pretty smug tho, I dont like it but overall great work.

reviews.review_title: My son loves being a commander!!!
reviews.review_description:
My 12 year old son and I play a lot of naval warfare games like battleship and when I heard about this game coming to the meta quest 3 we were really stoked!!

We’re going to have a special Tidal Tactics night with his friends on one of these weekends. We’re waiting for a multiplayer update and it’ll be even more fun 

Can’t believe we’re having a full fledged war in our yard. This game is making memories to cherisha

developer_response.body: That's awesome to hear! We are reinforcing our ships and polishing our weapons so your son and his friends can battle to rule the seas. Tell your son that Commander HQ salutes him.⚓🫡🌊

reviews.review_description: Game is straight-up awesome! The concept is super fresh and the whole look and feel is totally cinematic. I legit can’t stop playing. it’s one of those games you keep coming back to and never get bored of
The concept is super fresh, and the visuals? Pure cinema. It's one of those rare gems you just can’t put down. Every session feels new—total replay gold 🥇
its pretty fun but the enemy is a bit op so maybe they could work on that. i liked the visual s and the ui, it added to the futuristic feel of the game.  excited to see what comes next!

developer_response.body: We're sure you will get better with time. Practice makes perfect commander and we need to see you at your best. We have our finest officers working on the UI!

reviews.review_description: Super creative use of the Quest 3 mixed reality tools

developer_response.body: Hey SoakingRich, thanks for the appreciation. We hope you had a great experience.

reviews.review_description: I really really enjoyed this game!! I legit played for hours it was so engaging and immersive! I was just annoyed that there were several grenade hits that didn’t register because they weren’t “hard enough”. Perhaps ease up on that threshold, a simple drop suffices but otherwise terrific game and looking forward to updates!

developer_response.body:
That’s a great insight, thanks for sharing. Feel free to join our Discord or Reddit community where we post updates and listen to player suggestions. We're delighted you enjoyed the game.

Discord: KKWdpTJhfm
Reddit: r/tidaltactics_

reviews.review_description: Love how it adapts to my room 🏠. Can’t wait to try multiplayer and see how it works! Additionally, the enemy is wayy too good at roasting 😂🥲

developer_response.body: Lots of late hours grinding allowed us to make the game adapt procedurally to different environments.  Multiplayer should be ready soon, make sure you practice enough so that you can beat your friends easily!
